section.container: relative py-24 px-4 overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-[#0a91b1]/5 to-white

header.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
header.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight mb-6

container.base: relative bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-lg
container.popular: relative bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-xl ring-2 ring-[#0a91b1]

pricingCard.popularBadge: absolute top-0 right-0 bg-[#0a91b1] text-white px-4 py-1 text-sm font-medium rounded-bl-lg

button.base: block w-full text-center px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300
button.primary: block w-full text-center px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 bg-[#0a91b1] text-white hover:bg-[#097d99]
button.secondary: block w-full text-center px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-200

insuranceInfo.provider: px-4 py-2 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm text-gray-600
